name: Standard Chartered Platinum Rewards Credit Card
exclusions: one-time fee of INR 250 plus GST applies if spend of INR 500 or more is not done within 30 days from issuance
additionalBenefits: 5 reward points for every INR 150 spent at fine-dining outlets
5 reward points for every INR 150 spent on fuel
1 reward point for every INR 150 spent on all other categories
Lifetime-free style acquisition if first-30-day spend condition is met

salaried: Applicant age should be between 18 and 65 years
selfEmployed: Applicant age should be between 18 and 67 years
